messages.content:
Factors that Determine Visual Comfort, include:

Uniform illumination

Optimal luminance

Adequate contrast conditions

All other choices
are incorrect.

Fundamental fallacies about ergonomics design , include:

The design is satisfactory for me, and then it will, therefore, be satisfactory for everybody else.

The design is satisfactory for the average person, and then it will, therefore, be satisfactory for everybody else.

Ergonomics is expensive, and since products are purchased based on appearance and styling, ergonomics considerations be conveniently ignored

All other choices
are incorrect.

Ergonomics is often considered to refer to cognitive areas e.g (perception, memory, Logic & Reasoning, decision-making, Auditory & Visual Processing etc.) and focuses on the human as the most important component of our technological systems.
Select one:
True
False
True.

mportant considerations to remember in lifting, include:

Use mechanical means

It is easier to push than to pull

Keep the load as close as possible to the body

Bend at the knees, not the hips

Place items to be lifted within the power zone

All other choices
are incorrect.

Both terms Ergonomics and Human factors are used synonymously by practitioner of this science:
Select one:
True
False
True.

The cycle view of the supply chain is useful when considering operational decisions, because:

it specifies the roles and responsibilities of each member of the supply chain.

it categorizes processes based on whether they are initiated in response to or in anticipation of customer orders.

processes are identified as either reactive or speculative

it focuses on processes that are internal to the firm
it categorizes processes based on whether they are initiated in response to or in anticipation of customer orders.

The choice of the distribution network can be used to achieve supply chain objectives such as

high responsiveness

high cost

high responsibility

customer pick up
high responsiveness.

costs are those that are incurred in proportion to the quantity produced or shipped from a given facility:

Fixed

Law

Variable

High
Variable.

Distribution network performance evaluated along two dimensions at the highest level:

Response time and Product availability

Consumer demands that are met and how much they cost

Inventories cost and transportation cost

Customer evaluation cost and cost of meeting customer needs
Response time and Product availability.

The accounting department verifies the:

the quality of the received goods

the availability of funds to purchase the goods

the date upon which the goods are to be delivered

full details of goods or services to be purchased
the availability of funds to purchase the goods.

Groupware software

framework for information systems development

decision support system

Used to describe dat
Used to describe data. (Note: Groupware software is actually a type of collaborative software designed to facilitate communication and collaboration among members of a group.)

loud computing components are

Infrastructure

Application

Platform

All other choices

are incorrect. 

(Note: The correct answer should be "incorrect" since only three components are listed and "All other choices" is not applicable here.)
